ja.tool.description: Search files under a directory by name pattern (glob) and/or by content (regex).
ja.tool.system_prompt:
Search for files under a directory. You can filter by filename pattern (glob) and optionally grep file contents using a regular expression.

Notes:
- content_pattern is treated as a Python regular expression.
- If content_pattern is empty, only filename matching is performed.
- For performance and safety, binary-like files can be excluded from content searching.
